name: Sure Step 365 — Standard
description: Pre-populated starter content for Dynamics 365 implementations following Microsoft's Sure Step methodology with phase-gate governance and structured data migration.

executiveSummary.content:
This engagement implements {{customer_name}}'s Microsoft Dynamics 365 solution using the structured Sure Step 365 methodology. Sure Step provides a phased delivery model — Analyse, Design, Develop, Deploy, and Operate — with defined phase-gate reviews to ensure quality, stakeholder alignment, and risk control throughout the implementation lifecycle.

{{customer_name}} will benefit from a proven, repeatable implementation approach, robust data migration practices, and a comprehensive testing strategy that reduces go-live risk. The engagement covers the full end-to-end journey from solution design through hypercare, ensuring a successful transition to steady-state operations.

inScope.text: Requirements gathering and Fit-Gap analysis (Analyse phase)
Solution design and configuration of Dynamics 365 modules as agreed
Custom development for identified gaps (within agreed man-day budget)
Data migration: extract, transform, load (ETL) for agreed entity list
System Integration Testing (SIT) and User Acceptance Testing (UAT) facilitation
Cutover planning and go-live support (Deploy phase)

outOfScope.text: Microsoft Dynamics 365 licence procurement and provisioning
Integration with third-party systems not listed in the agreed integration register
Data cleansing and de-duplication in source systems ({{customer_name}} responsibility)
Ongoing managed support beyond the 4-week hypercare period

sureStepMethodology.methodologyOverview: The Sure Step 365 methodology structures this Dynamics 365 implementation into five sequential phases: Analyse, Design, Develop, Deploy, and Operate. Each phase concludes with a phase-gate review attended by Microsoft and {{customer_name}} project sponsors. Approval to proceed to the next phase requires documented sign-off on all gate criteria.
sureStepMethodology.approachDetails:
Analyse: Conduct current-state workshops, document business requirements, perform Fit-Gap analysis against standard Dynamics 365 functionality, and produce a Solution Blueprint.

Design: Author functional and technical design documents covering configuration, customisation, integrations, and data migration strategy.

Develop: Configure the D365 environment, develop custom components, build ETL scripts, and conduct unit testing.

Deploy: Execute SIT, facilitate UAT with {{customer_name}} super-users, complete data migration dry runs, train end-users, and execute production cutover.

Operate: Deliver 4-week hypercare support, transition to {{customer_name}} support team, and conduct a Post-Implementation Review.
sureStepMethodology.governanceModel: A Project Steering Committee (Microsoft Engagement Lead + {{customer_name}} Executive Sponsor) meets bi-weekly. A joint Project Management Office (PMO) tracks milestones, risks, and issues via an agreed RAID log. Phase-gate sign-off requires approval from both parties.
sureStepMethodology.qualityAssurance: Quality is enforced through: (1) peer review of all design documents prior to {{customer_name}} review, (2) code review gates in Azure DevOps before any customisation is promoted, (3) structured SIT with defect tracking in ADO, (4) UAT executed by {{customer_name}} super-users against agreed test scripts with a minimum 95% pass rate before go-live approval.

phasesDeliverables.acceptanceCriteria: Reviewed and approved at Design phase-gate

phasesDeliverables.deliverable: Configured D365 environment + custom components + ETL scripts
phasesDeliverables.acceptanceCriteria: Unit test results show <5% defect rate; code review approved

phasesDeliverables.deliverable: SIT & UAT completion report; trained user base; production go-live
Post-Implementation Review report; support handover pack

dataMigration.approach: Data migration follows a three-pass approach: (1) a full dry-run at the end of the Develop phase to validate ETL scripts and reconcile record counts; (2) a mock cutover during UAT to validate timing and rollback procedures; (3) the final production migration during the agreed cutover weekend. All migration activities are governed by a Data Migration Plan approved by {{customer_name}}.

testingStrategy.overview: Testing encompasses unit testing (Microsoft), System Integration Testing (Microsoft-led), and User Acceptance Testing ({{customer_name}}-led with Microsoft facilitation). A dedicated test environment mirrors production configuration. Defects are tracked in Azure DevOps with severity classifications (Critical/High/Medium/Low). No Critical or High defects may remain open at UAT sign-off.

phases.exit: All unit tests pass; no critical defects
SIT pass rate ≥98%; all critical/high defects resolved

assumptions.text: {{customer_name}} will provide dedicated super-users (min. 2 per functional area) to participate in UAT
Source system data will be available for extraction in agreed formats; {{customer_name}} owns data cleansing
Microsoft will have admin access to the {{customer_name}} Dynamics 365 tenant throughout the engagement
Phase-gate decisions will be made within 5 business days of deliverable submission

customerResponsibilities.text: Provide super-users for UAT and end-user training attendance
Own data cleansing and quality in source systems prior to migration dry-run
Provision Dynamics 365 tenant, licences, and required Azure infrastructure
Approve phase-gate deliverables within agreed SLA

risks.text: Poor source data quality delaying migration — mitigated by early data profiling in Analyse phase and {{customer_name}} data cleansing commitment
Scope creep from undiscovered requirements — mitigated by thorough Fit-Gap analysis and formal change control process
UAT resource unavailability — mitigated by scheduling super-user availability at project kickoff and 4-week advance notice of UAT window

members.responsibilities: Executive stakeholder management, phase-gate governance, commercial control
Day-to-day delivery management, RAID log, status reporting
Custom development, integrations, data migration ETL
Training design, train-the-trainer delivery, adoption planning

teamStructure.supportTransitionPlan: 4-week hypercare period post go-live with dedicated functional consultant (50% allocation). Support requests triaged via agreed ticketing channel; P1 response within 2 business hours.

priorityDefinitions.description: System unavailable or core business process blocked
Major function impaired but workaround exists

supportHypercare.transitionNotes: At the end of hypercare, {{customer_name}} IT team assumes ownership. Microsoft will provide a final handover meeting, updated runbook, and contact details for Dynamics 365 product support.
